title: Gynochthodes ridleyi

Traditionally, Gynochthodes ridleyi has been used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Gynochthodes ridleyi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Gynochthodes ridleyi is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the production of traditional remedies, such as teas and tonics, to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
